div.p: Warps currently issuing instructions to execution units.

ul.li: Diagnosis: Normal utilization. Current ILP is sufficient.

div.p: CRITICAL THRESHOLD EXCEEDED (>30%) Warps blocked on LD/ST operations (Global/Local/Texture).

ul.li: Check: Coalescing efficiency, L2 cache hit rate.
Action: Optimize memory access patterns (Avoid Bank Conflicts).

div.p: Warps ready to execute but waiting for the Warp Scheduler.

ul.li: Insight: Indicates sufficient Thread Level Parallelism.
Saturation: High eligible + low active = scheduler contention.

div.p: Wait for execution pipeline (FP32, FP64, INT, Tensor).

ul.li: Cause: High latency instructions or structural hazards.

ol.li: Global Memory: Align accesses to 128B cache lines.
Shared Memory: Use for temporal data reuse to bypass DRAM.
Occupancy: Evaluate if higher occupancy hides latency.
